description: ListAlpha is a deal and relationship management platform for private capital teams. Its CRM product, branded in the docs as Carta CRM, helps users manage companies, contacts, deals, fundraising workflows, notes, and reports.
summary: ListAlpha exposes a Carta CRM REST API at `https://crm-public-api.app.carta.com` authenticated by API key, plus an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.listalpha.com/mcp`.
